use std::collections::BinaryHeap;

fn top_k(values: &[u64], k: usize) -> Vec<u64> {
    let mut heap = BinaryHeap::with_capacity(k);
    for &v in values {
        if heap.len() < k {
            heap.push(v);
        } else if let Some(mut min) = heap.peek_mut() {
            if v > *min {
                *min = v;
            }
        }
    }
    heap.into_sorted_vec()
}
